title: Nara,  — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nara, : cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nara is a city in with a population of 360,000. Japan’s first permanent capital, famous for its friendly deer in Nara Park and the massive Todaiji Buddha statue.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
